mapper.sql: NT.NOTE_TRNSMIT_ID AS noteTrnsmitId , N.NOTE_ID AS noteId , NT.TRNSMITER_ID AS trnsmiterId , N.NOTE_SJ AS noteSj , N.NOTE_CN AS noteCn , N.ATCH_FILE_ID AS atchFileId , TO_CHAR(NT.FRST_REGIST_PNTTM,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS frstRegisterPnttm
mapper.select: SELECT FROM TB_NOTE_TRNSMIT NT , TB_NOTE N WHERE NT.NOTE_ID = N.NOTE_ID AND NT.DELETE_AT = 'N' ORDER BY NT.FRST_REGIST_PNTTM DESC LIMIT #{recordCountPerPage} OFFSET #{firstIndex}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_NOTE_TRNSMIT NT , TB_NOTE N WHERE NT.NOTE_ID = N.NOTE_ID AND NT.DELETE_AT = 'N'
SELECT FROM TB_NOTE_TRNSMIT NT , TB_NOTE N WHERE NT.NOTE_ID = N.NOTE_ID AND NT.NOTE_TRNSMIT_ID = #{noteTrnsmitId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_NOTE_RECPTN WHERE NOTE_TRNSMIT_ID = #{noteTrnsmitId} AND DELETE_AT = 'N'

SELECT NOTE_RECPTN_ID AS noteRecptnId , NOTE_ID AS noteId , NOTE_TRNSMIT_ID AS noteTrnsmitId , RCVER_ID AS trnsmiterId , READNG_AT AS openYn FROM TB_NOTE_RECPTN WHERE NOTE_TRNSMIT_ID = #{noteTrnsmitId}
mapper.update: UPDATE TB_NOTE_TRNSMIT SET DELETE_AT = 'Y' , LAST_UPDT_PNTTM = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE NOTE_TRNSMIT_ID = #{noteTrnsmitId}
